languages.text: "Перед ликом истины каждый вынужден явить свое настоящее лицо. В лице этого... субъекта я вижу лишь неконтролируемую жажду энтропии, что делает его существование бессмысленным. Это неоспоримый факт".

"Before the visage of truth, everyone is compelled to manifest their genuine self. In this... subject, I see only an uncontrolled thirst for entropy, making his existence meaningless. This is an incontrovertible fact."
languages.original_text: "Перед ликом истины каждый вынужден явить свое настоящее лицо. В лице этого... субъекта я вижу лишь неконтролируемую жажду энтропии, что делает его существование бессмысленным. Это неоспоримый факт".

traits.locale_text: "Before the visage of truth, everyone is compelled to manifest their genuine self. In this... subject, I see only an uncontrolled thirst for entropy, making his existence meaningless. This is an incontrovertible fact."

"Before the visage of truth, everyone is compelled to manifest their genuine self. In this... subject, I see only an uncontrolled thirst for entropy, making his existence meaningless. This is an incontrovertible fact."

"Before the visage of truth, everyone is compelled to manifest their genuine self. In this... subject, I see only an uncontrolled thirst for entropy, making his existence meaningless. This is an incontrovertible fact."

"Before the visage of truth, everyone is compelled to manifest their genuine self. In this... subject, I see only an uncontrolled thirst for entropy, making his existence meaningless. This is an incontrovertible fact."

languages.text: «Ante el rostro de la verdad, todos se ven obligados a manifestar su verdadero ser. En este... sujeto veo solo una sed insaciable de entropía, lo que hace que su vida carezca de sentido. Es un hecho irrefutable».
languages.original_text: "Before the visage of truth, everyone is compelled to manifest their genuine self. In this... subject, I see only an uncontrolled thirst for entropy, making his existence meaningless. This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: «Ante el rostro de la verdad, todos se ven obligados a manifestar su verdadero ser. En este... sujeto veo solo una sed insaciable de entropía, lo que hace que su vida carezca de sentido. Es un hecho irrefutable».

languages.text: “在真理面前，人人都被迫显露出真实的自我。在这个……实验对象身上，我只看到对熵的无节制渴求，这使他的存在变得毫无意义。这一点毋庸置疑。”
languages.original_text: "Before the visage of truth, everyone is compelled to manifest their genuine self. In this... subject, I see only an uncontrolled thirst for entropy, making his existence meaningless. This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: “在真理面前，人人都被迫显露出真实的自我。在这个……实验对象身上，我只看到对熵的无节制渴求，这使他的存在变得毫无意义。这一点毋庸置疑。”

languages.text: "Vor dem Antlitz der Wahrheit ist jeder gezwungen, sein wahres Ich zu manifestieren. In diesem ... Subjekt sehe ich nur einen unkontrollierten Durst nach Entropie, der seine Existenz bedeutungslos macht. Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."
languages.original_text: "Before the visage of truth, everyone is compelled to manifest their genuine self. In this... subject, I see only an uncontrolled thirst for entropy, making his existence meaningless. This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: "Vor dem Antlitz der Wahrheit ist jeder gezwungen, sein wahres Ich zu manifestieren. In diesem ... Subjekt sehe ich nur einen unkontrollierten Durst nach Entropie, der seine Existenz bedeutungslos macht. Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."

languages.text: « Devant le visage de la vérité, tous sont contraints de dévoiler leur vraie nature. Or, je ne vois dans ce... sujet qu'une soif incontrôlée d'entropie, qui rend son existence nulle et non avenue. Il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. »
languages.original_text: "Before the visage of truth, everyone is compelled to manifest their genuine self. In this... subject, I see only an uncontrolled thirst for entropy, making his existence meaningless. This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: « Devant le visage de la vérité, tous sont contraints de dévoiler leur vraie nature. Or, je ne vois dans ce... sujet qu'une soif incontrôlée d'entropie, qui rend son existence nulle et non avenue. Il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. »

languages.text: "Gerçeğin sureti karşısında herkes gerçek benliğini ortaya koymaya mecburdur. Bu... Denekte, sadece varoluşunu anlamsız kılan kontrolsüz bir entropi susuzluğu görüyorum. Bu inkâr edilemez bir gerçek."
languages.original_text: "Before the visage of truth, everyone is compelled to manifest their genuine self. In this... subject, I see only an uncontrolled thirst for entropy, making his existence meaningless. This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: "Gerçeğin sureti karşısında herkes gerçek benliğini ortaya koymaya mecburdur. Bu... Denekte, sadece varoluşunu anlamsız kılan kontrolsüz bir entropi susuzluğu görüyorum. Bu inkâr edilemez bir gerçek."

languages.text: 「真実の顔の前に、人は本性を現さざるをえなくなる。この...対象は、ただ無秩序なエントロピーへの渇望しか見せず、存在意義を欠いている。これは揺るぎない事実である。」
languages.original_text: "Before the visage of truth, everyone is compelled to manifest their genuine self. In this... subject, I see only an uncontrolled thirst for entropy, making his existence meaningless. This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: 「真実の顔の前に、人は本性を現さざるをえなくなる。この...対象は、ただ無秩序なエントロピーへの渇望しか見せず、存在意義を欠いている。これは揺るぎない事実である。」
